citation: Pezeshkian, W., Pleijnik, M.R., Barrero, G.B., Marrink, S.J. Membrane morphology simulation with FreeDTS. Nature Communications (2024).
notes: FreeDTS (Dynamically Triangulated Surface) membrane simulator used in Thornburg 2026 to model Syn3A's membrane morphology as it grows and divides. The input_data/ of Minimal_Cell_4DWCM contains a 6.1 MB oneParamMulder-local_min.json that is almost certainly a FreeDTS state file. Not directly on our Layer-6 critical path, but register for citation completeness.
